mapper.select: SELECT tg.*, u.username AS user_name, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM travel_guide tg LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON tg.user_id = u.id ORDER BY tg.id ASC
SELECT tg.*, u.username AS user_name, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM travel_guide tg LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON tg.user_id = u.id WHERE tg.id = #{id} AND u.status = 1
SELECT tg.*, u.username AS user_name, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM travel_guide tg LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON tg.user_id = u.id WHERE tg.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY tg.created_at DESC
SELECT tg.*, u.username AS user_name, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM travel_guide tg LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON tg.user_id = u.id WHERE tg.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY tg.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO travel_guide (id, user_id, title, content, cover_image, tags, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{coverImage}, #{tags}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE travel_guide SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, tags = #{tags}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE travel_guide SET status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE travel_guide SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE travel_guide SET favorite_count = favorite_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE travel_guide SET favorite_count = GREATEST(favorite_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE travel_guide SET id = id - 1 WHERE id > #{afterId}
UPDATE travel_guide t JOIN (SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS new_id FROM travel_guide) r ON t.id = r.id SET t.id = r.new_id
